'''Tonqu flowers''' were a type of [[Flower/Legends|flower]] known to the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="Finally" /> as of [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].<ref name="Finally" /><ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> They used their sweet scent to lure [[Insect/Legends|insects]] to alight upon them, before trapping them there as the tonqu flower's long petal rolled up.<ref name="Finally" /> In 29 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="ERC" /> former Yuuzhan Vong [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor]] [[Nom Anor]] compared the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] to a tonqu flower, as it attracted beings and did not let them go.<ref name="Finally" />

==Behind the scenes==
The tonqu flower's only mention was in [[2003]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy|''The Final Prophecy'']], written by [[Greg Keyes]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. Though the flower's effect suggests a [[Diet/Legends|carnivorous]] nature, no source confirms this, so this article does not treat the flower as such.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1stm}}
